text:
The paper is confirmed on PubMed, PMC/NIH, and the publisher's (Spandidos) website with the exact title, all cited authors, venue (*Mol Clin Oncol*), and year (2024). The automated checker appears to have matched a completely different paper ("Precision medicine in breast cancer" by Teresa G. Odle, 2017, in *Radiologic Technology*), which is a separate publication sharing the same title.

EXPLANATION: The cited paper is confirmed on PubMed (PMID linked to doi:10.3892/mco.2024.2776) and the Spandidos publisher page with the exact title, all 10 cited authors, venue *Mol Clin Oncol*, and year 2024. The automated checker matched a different, older paper with the same title by a different author in a different journal.
